title: Coordinator-PDR deferral + experiment notes
body: Verdant Swaying Glade opening narrow knowledge-curation claim on agentic-engineering-enhancements thread. Owner direction (this session): hold the coordinator-PDR candidate pending, do not promote, instead add experiment notes cross-referencing the start-right-team self-assigned-roles experiment so we do not entrench the first possibly naive role-set. Bootstrap fast-path: zero non-abandoned claims and zero active queue entries before this open; no other agents present. Surfaces: pending-graduations.md (coordinator entry amendment), falsification-criteria.md (P1 connection to candidate), napkin.md (session note), threads/agentic-engineering-enhancements.next-session.md (identity row), repo-continuity.md (identity summary). No commit window opened; outputs land in working tree alongside Sylvan Budding Forest's uncommitted consolidation outputs and Shadowed Glimmering Night's external-substrate research file. Closeout will recommend commit framing to owner.
